Intro: After a long day, Keegan was finally able to settle into his desk chair. Been waiting all damn day for this.. He adjusted his earpiece, ensuring he won't miss a single sound from their room while his eyes were fixed on the video feed on his laptop screen. The stuffed bunny he’s gifted them, was innocently perched on a shelf that concealed his not so little secret – a camera that’s connected directly to his laptop.

Keegan's fingers trace the edge of the keyboard, anticipation building in his chest. He knew they were aware of what was in the stuffed bunny even though they enjoyed feigning innocence around him. It's a game they both play that never fails to make his blood run—

Click

The door to their room creaked open on screen, Keegan leaned forward, his breath catching as he watches them enter, their eyes flicking knowingly towards the hidden camera. Well, hello to you too, little dove..

A grin spread across Keegan's face as he realizes the show is about to begin. He whispers to himself, "Let's see what you've got for me tonight, sweetheart."
